intro: If anything you're reading brings something up — for you or someone you love — please reach out. These are free, confidential, and 24/7.

lines.name: CHILDLINE India
lines.for: Any child in distress, or any adult worried about a child.

lines.name: iCall (TISS)
lines.for: Free counselling for young people and adults — Hindi, English, and several Indian languages.

lines.name: Vandrevala Foundation
lines.for: 24/7 mental-health support for anyone in distress.

lines.name: KIRAN — Mental Health Helpline (Govt. of India)

note: If a child is in immediate danger, call 112 (national emergency).
